title: midnight craving citrusy light tunisian ground tagine
description: A delicious and refreshing twist on traditional tunisian cuisine, perfect for satisfying your midnight cravings. This light and citrusy dish is packed with flavor and can be prepared in under an hour.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and saut40e until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the ground clove and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until it starts to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the katsuramuki-cut carrots and cook for 2-3 minutes, until they start to soften.
Add the lemon juice, orange juice, and harissa (if using), and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped parsley and cilantro, and serve hot or at room temperature.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley and cilantro if desired.
